signals.raw:
No breaking GDP news confirmed, announced, or resolved right now that would move prediction markets | NO | HIGH confidence**

The most recent US GDP development is the third estimate from April 9, 2026, downgrading Q4 2025 growth to 0.5% annualized, slower than prior estimates, amid consumer resilience and inflation at 3% pre-crude shock[1]. Other items like AI spending projections to 5.6% of GDP
